title: Capital Structure: Which of the following best describes the concept of financial...
summary: Analyze a concept in theories of finance related to Capital Structure.
prompt: Which of the following best describes the concept of financial leverage?

options.text: Step 2: Understand that while leverage can amplify returns, it also
Firm value decreases due to higher risk

solution:
Step 1: Define financial leverage as the use of debt to acquire additional assets.
Step 2: Understand that while leverage can amplify returns, it also increases risk.
Step 3: Conclude that B accurately describes financial leverage as it focuses on increasing potential return through the use of debt.
